name: Zoho CRM

composio_registry_match.name: Zoho
composio_registry_match.description: Zoho is a suite of cloud applications including CRM, email marketing, and collaboration tools, enabling businesses to automate and scale operations

description: A comprehensive customer relationship management platform designed to help businesses manage sales, marketing, and customer support processes.
notes: Zoho CRM is highly buildable and already has extensive integrations (including 57 tools on Composio) utilizing its comprehensive REST API with OAuth2.
